name: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc.
business: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a neuroscience-focused biopharmaceutical company advancing a differentiated product pipeline led by azetukalner, a Kv7 potassium channel opener in Phase 3 studies for epilepsy, major depressive disorder, and bipolar depression. The company also has early-stage programs targeting pain via Nav1.7 and Kv7 modulators, and a collaboration with Neurocrine Biosciences for sodium channel inhibitors.
sellsTo: patients with primary generalized tonic-clonic seizures

exposures.sentence: Azetukalner, a novel, potent Kv7 potassium channel opener, represents the most advanced, clinically-validated potassium channel modulator in late-stage clinical development for the treatment of multiple indications, including two in epilepsy focal onset seizures, or FOS, and primary generalized tonic-clonic seizures, or PGTCS, as well as neuropsychiatric disorders, including MDD or BPD.
Pain Phase 1 SAD/MAD study in healthy adult participants is underway for XEN1701 targeting Nav1.7.
Pain Phase 1 SAD/MAD study in healthy adult participants is underway for XEN1120 targeting Kv7.

catalysts.sentence: Topline data from the Phase 3 X-TOLE2 study of azetukalner in FOS is on track for the first half of March 2026.
X-TOLE3 enrollment in all countries except Japan is expected to complete in 2026.
Topline data from X-NOVA2 are expected in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 1 SAD/MAD completion for XEN1701 and XEN1120
catalysts.sentence: Completion of both Phase 1 SAD/MAD studies is expected in 2026, and we plan to evaluate the results of both studies for their potential to support initiating Phase 2 proof-of-concept studies in acute pain.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 60% of people with epilepsy in the U.S. have FOS, resulting in about 1.8 million patients.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 60% of people with epilepsy in the U.S. have FOS, which results in a total patient population of approximately 1.8 million.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 30% of people with epilepsy in the U.S. have generalized seizures, about 0.9 million, with the majority experiencing PGTCS.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 30% of people with epilepsy in the U.S., or approximately 0.9 million, have generalized seizures, of which the majority experience PGTCS.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated 7.8% of U.S. adults (21.0 million) experience MDD each year.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the National Institutes of Health, an estimated 7.8% of U.S. adults (21.0 million) experience MDD each year.

tamClaims.claim: Bipolar disorder impacts an estimated 6 million U.S. adults.
tamClaims.sentence: BPD refers to the depressive episodes that are part of bipolar disorder, a psychiatric condition impacting an estimated 6 million U.S. adults.

tamClaims.claim: Chronic pain affects more than one in five American adults.
tamClaims.sentence: 2021 data from the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, or CDC, show that chronic pain affects more than one in five American adults.
